title: FEMA/FDI Advisory in Andhra Pradesh | Virtual Auditor
description: FEMA/FDI Advisory in Andhra Pradesh. From ₹15,000. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. FEMA compliance, FDI reporting (FC-GPR/FC-TRS), ECB complian. Contact +91 99622
bodyText:
What is fema compliance & fdi advisory? FEMA compliance, FDI reporting (FC-GPR/FC-TRS), ECB compliance, ODI advisory, FEMA compounding, 15CA/15CB certification.
FEMA Compliance & FDI Advisory is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Andhra Pradesh, Andhra Pradesh since 2012.
Quick Answer: FEMA/FDI Advisory in Andhra Pradesh — FEMA compliance, FDI reporting (FC-GPR/FC-TRS), ECB compliance, ODI advisory, FEMA compounding, 15CA. From ₹15,000. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: FEMA Compliance & FDI Advisory in Andhra Pradesh
Virtual Auditor provides fema compliance & fdi advisory across Andhra Pradesh. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve businesses throughout Andhra Pradesh with the same quality of FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV-led professional services.
The ROC Hyderabad handles company registrations and filings for Andhra Pradesh. Stamp duty: 5% on authorised capital. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year.

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.a: FC-GPR (Foreign Currency - Gross Provisional Return) is filed within 30 days of share allotment to a foreign investor under FDI.
When there's been a contravention of FEMA provisions — late filings, incorrect pricing, or procedural non-compliance.
Yes. We manage the intersection of FEMA, Income Tax, and Companies Act for cross-border investments and remittances.

faqs.q: Do you provide fema/fdi advisory services in Andhra Pradesh?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Andhra Pradesh from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Andhra Pradesh?
faqs.a: Companies registered in Andhra Pradesh fall under ROC Hyderabad. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Andhra Pradesh-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Andhra Pradesh?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in Andhra Pradesh: 5% on authorised capital. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
